text:
If it builds, I approve. Can't test this currently for a few weeks.

On Thu, Jul 30, 2009 at 2:20 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of multimedia/vlc,
>
> Please note that PR ports/137251 has just been submitted.

> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/137251
